name: Lemon-Bourbon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and cornstarch in a small saucepan; stir in water.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens.
3. Remove from heat; stir in butter until melted.
4. Add bourbon, lemon rind, and lemon juice; mix well until fish flakes easily.
